title: feishu_bitable_draft_form
description: Input for phase 1 (draft review) of converting a Feishu bitable into a questionnaire. Server forces mode=feishu_bitable_to_form and require_human_confirmation=true; the agent stops after capturing draft questions and returns a draft_session_id that must be passed back into feishu_bitable_publish_form.

query.description: Natural-language instruction. Should contain the Feishu bitable URL (e.g. https://*.feishu.cn/base/... or /wiki/...). The server auto-extracts the URL when bitable_url is omitted.
examples: 请把这个飞书多维表格转成问卷：https://lexmount.feishu.cn/wiki/DrETwmLEmiHUZ9kDkAsctla5nkK

bitable_url.description: Optional explicit Feishu bitable URL. When omitted, the server extracts it from `query`. Provide this only if your `query` does not already contain the URL or if you want to override the extracted one.

headless.description: Whether to run the browser in headless mode.

profile_id.description: Server-side stored auth profile id. If omitted, the service falls back to FEISHU_DEFAULT_PROFILE_ID.

storage_state.description: Playwright storage state JSON object for an already logged-in Feishu session.

storage_state_path.description: Path to an existing Feishu storage state file inside the container.

sensitive_data.description: Optional Browser Use sensitive_data payload for login assistance.
